title: Group Exercise Instructor
description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking passionate and energetic Group Exercise Instructors to lead engaging, safe, and effective group fitness classes. The ideal candidate will be highly motivated, possess strong communication skills, and have a solid background in fitness instruction. You will play a vital role in enhancing member satisfaction, promoting a healthy lifestyle, and contributing to a dynamic fitness community.

⸻

Key Responsibilities:
  •  Conduct a minimum of 60 group classes per month across various formats (e.g., HIIT, cycling, strength training, etc.)
  •  Deliver high-energy, results-driven classes with proper technique and safety in mind
  •  Engage and motivate participants of all fitness levels
  •  Provide modifications and progressions as needed
  •  Create a welcoming, inclusive, and professional class environment
  •  Monitor attendance, gather feedback, and contribute to continuous class improvement
  •  Collaborate with the fitness team and attend regular meetings or training sessions
  •  Ensure all equipment and facilities are maintained and used appropriately

⸻

Requirements:
  •  Valid certification in Group Exercise Instruction (ACE, AFAA, Les Mills, Zumba, Yoga Alliance, etc.)
  •  CPR/AED certification (or willing to obtain upon hiring)
  •  Proven experience in conducting group fitness classes (minimum 1 year preferred)
  •  Strong interpersonal and communication skills
  •  Availability to teach a flexible schedule, including evenings and weekends

. •  Certified in at least 2 LM programs

⸻

What We Offer:
  •  Salary starting from SGD 4500/month
  •  Opportunities for professional development and training
  •  Supportive and energetic work environment
  •  Access to gym facilities and wellness programs

postedCompany.description: Founded in 2002 and headquartered in Hong Kong, The Pure Group is Asia’s leading premium lifestyle brand that includes Pure Yoga, Pure Fitness, Pure Apparel and nood food. Pure Group has locations in Hong Kong, Shanghai, Singapore, Taipei and New York. Pure Yoga has a wide variety of yoga classes and private yoga programmes, including workshops with renowned teachers from all over the world. Pure Fitness offers the industry’s best from around the globe, from strength and cardio training to dynamic group classes led by the top international instructors. Together with Pure Apparel’s performance activewear and nood food’s innovative organic health foods and cold-pressed juices, the Pure Group is an integrated community dedicated to helping people lead a balanced 360° lifestyle. The Group currently has over 70,000 clients and more than 1,600 employees.
postedCompany.name: PURE INTERNATIONAL (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
